description: Placeholder index for the not-yet-released Cosmere RPG Mistborn Handbook. No data files yet — this scaffold lets the Reference tab list Mistborn and show a 'coming soon' state without erroring. Populate `files` (system/origins/paths/etc., same schema as SCHEMA.md) once the book ships and tools/extract.sh RULESET=mistborn has produced local raw text to paraphrase from. Not affiliated with Brandon Sanderson, Dragonsteel, or Brotwise Games.

todo: everything — book unreleased; awaiting source to paraphrase from
